message:
feat(policy): integrate trauma guard into policy engine with bypass and synthetic feedback

Wire the TraumaDecision into the policy authorization pipeline so the
CommandGate can block commands when the trauma guard detects a fix-forward
death spiral, with explicit bypass support and synthetic PTY feedback.

Policy engine changes (policy.rs):
- PolicyInput gains trauma_decision: Option<TraumaDecision> field and
  builder method with_trauma_decision() for callers to supply the
  guard's decision alongside the command text
- DecisionContext now records trauma evidence (present/absent,
  should_intervene, reason_code, repeat_count) for audit trails
- PolicyEngine gains trauma_guard_enabled bool and builder method
  with_trauma_guard_enabled() for runtime enable/disable
- authorize() for SendText actions: when trauma_guard_enabled and
  decision.should_intervene is true, returns Deny with reason code
  "trauma_guard_death_spiral_block"
- Emergency bypass: has_trauma_bypass_prefix() parses shell env var
  prefixes to detect FT_BYPASS_TRAUMA=1 — agents/operators who KNOW
  they need to brute-force a flaky command can explicitly override
- trauma_feedback_comment() generates a synthetic shell comment that
  gets injected into the pane output when a command is blocked,
  providing immediate feedback to the LLM to change strategy
- PolicyGatedInjector::maybe_inject_trauma_feedback() sends the
  comment to the pane writer on deny decisions
- Deny path in inject_gated_action now calls
  maybe_inject_trauma_feedback()
- evaluate_command_gate now joins backslash-continued lines before
  per-line evaluation for multi-line command support
- New COMMAND_TOKENS for execution prefixes: nohup, time, watch,
  timeout, stdbuf, unbuffer, strace, ltrace, taskset
- Tightened RM_RF_ROOT regex formatting

MCP wiring (mcp.rs):
- build_policy_engine() now chains
  .with_trauma_guard_enabled(config.safety.trauma_guard.enabled)
  so MCP server respects the trauma guard config

New tests (8):
- has_trauma_bypass_prefix detection (positive and negative cases)
- trauma_feedback_comment generation with reason/repeat count
- trauma block: sendtext denied when should_intervene is true
- trauma bypass: FT_BYPASS_TRAUMA=1 prefix allows through
- trauma disabled: commands pass when guard is off
- synthetic feedback injection verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1242,6 +1242,7 @@ fn build_policy_engine(config: &Config, require_prompt_active: bool) -> PolicyEn
         require_prompt_active,
     )
     .with_command_gate_config(config.safety.command_gate.clone())
+    .with_trauma_guard_enabled(config.safety.trauma_guard.enabled)
     .with_policy_rules(config.safety.rules.clone())
 }
